AuthSignIn.description: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials.
AuthSignIn.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

CmsHome.emptyDescription: Your CMS homepage is set but it does not have any content blocks yet. Start building in the admin panel to replace this placeholder with your custom layout.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for.
NotFound.frontendDescription: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

Hero.titleStart: A modern storefront that feels tailored
Hero.description: Highlight your best products, give every collection a story, and keep the look aligned with your CMS theme without extra layout work.
Hero.setupStepOne: Upload your logo and brand colors.
Hero.featuredStackDescription: Use the CMS appearance controls to keep each section consistent, then spotlight the products that deserve attention.
Hero.focusTitle: Design for discovery, then let the catalog do the rest.
Hero.focusDescription: Pair editorial sections with product cards to guide visitors toward what you want to sell most.

Signature.title: Bring a sense of direction to every collection.
Signature.description: Use this editorial band to spotlight new releases, seasonal edits, or staff picks. It keeps the focus tight while the catalog grows.
Signature.launchKitDescription: From brand setup to live link.

Highlights.title: Everything you need to make the homepage feel complete.
Highlights.description: The fallback layout balances storytelling with shopping, so you can launch while your CMS pages are still coming together.
Highlights.itemOneDescription: Blend storytelling and commerce with hero, highlights, and product grids.
Highlights.itemTwoDescription: Every section respects your CMS appearance palette and display modes.
Highlights.itemThreeDescription: Keep attention on the catalog with clean, image-led cards.

Collections.title: Build a narrative around your catalog.
Collections.description: Create small edits and spotlight them with scrollable cards.
Collections.seasonalEditDescription: A focused set of seasonal picks.
Collections.essentialsDescription: Core items that anchor the catalog.

Products.title: Featured catalog
Products.description: Keep your best items front and center with a clean, image-first grid.
Products.emptyDescription: Your products will appear here once you add them in the admin panel. Start by creating a few featured items and uploading imagery.

NextSteps.title: Want a fully custom homepage?
NextSteps.description: Build a CMS landing page and swap this fallback for bespoke layouts whenever you are ready.

Footer.description: Curated commerce powered by your CMS appearance settings.

Product.noDescription: No description available yet. Add details in the admin panel to make this product stand out.
Product.themeAlignedDescription: Built to match your CMS appearance settings.
Product.catalogReadyDescription: Showcase tags, categories, and inventory status.
Product.confidentDisplayDescription: Highlight pricing, specs, and availability at a glance.

home.label: Start screen

kangur.description: Solve Mathematical Kangaroo tasks step by step.

calendar_quiz.label: Calendar practice

logical_patterns_quiz.label: Patterns quiz

logical_classification_quiz.label: Classification quiz
logical_classification_quiz.description: Sort items and find shared traits.

logical_analogies_quiz.label: Analogies quiz
logical_analogies_quiz.description: Practise analogies and relationships in quick rounds.

english_sentence_quiz.label: Sentence structure quiz
english_sentence_quiz.description: Practise sentence order, questions, and conjunctions in English.

english_parts_of_speech_quiz.label: Parts of speech quiz
english_parts_of_speech_quiz.description: Sort words by parts of speech in short rounds.

operation.label: Game type selection
operation.description: Choose the type of maths game and its difficulty level.

playing.label: Question to solve
playing.description: Solve the current question without hints and with a final answer ready.

result.label: Game result
result.description: Review the game result and decide what to practise next.

home.missingLearnerDescription: Add or choose a learner profile in the section below to see progress and today's missions.
home.priorityAssignmentsEmpty: No active assignments from the parent.

intro.maths: Choose a game type and jump straight into maths practice.
intro.alphabet: Choose a letter game and practise the alphabet.
intro.geometry: Choose a shapes game and practise geometry.
intro.language: Choose a language game type and jump straight into practice.

quickPractice.title: Quick practice
quickPractice.description: Quick quizzes based on lesson topics.

tabs.title: Dashboard tabs
tabs.description: Switch between scores, progress, assignments, monitoring, and AI Tutor settings.

unauthenticated.title: Parent / Teacher dashboard
unauthenticated.description: This view shows the learner's private progress, so it requires a parent account. If you do not have one yet, create it without leaving StudiQ.
unauthenticated.summarySuffix: If you do not have a parent account yet, create it without leaving StudiQ.

restricted.title: Parent dashboard
restricted.description: This view is available only for a parent account that manages learner profiles.
restricted.summarySuffix: This view is available only for a parent account that manages learner profiles.

hero.noLearnerDescription: Add or choose a learner profile in the section below to see progress and today's missions.

activity.offlineDescription: No current activity in the app.

observability.currentGeneric: The learner is active in the app.

page.sessionDescriptionAuthenticated: Parent dashboard with scores, learner progress, assignments, monitoring, and AI Tutor support.
page.sessionDescriptionRestricted: Restricted-access view of the parent dashboard.

assignments.title: Learner assignments
assignments.description: Set work priorities and review what is active or needs a reminder.

progress.title: Learner progress
progress.description: Review learning rhythm, current level, daily missions, and the main next focus.

dailyQuest.label: Daily mission
dailyQuest.description: This is the learner's current daily mission, synced with the game and profile views.

openedTasks.label: Opened tasks
openedTasks.description: Recent learner activity for every task they opened.
openedTasks.empty: No recorded openings yet. Data will appear when the learner starts a task.

assignments.loadError: We could not load active assignments.

lessonProgress.label: Lesson progress
lessonProgress.description: Lesson progress saved panel by panel.

monitoring.title: Assignment monitoring
monitoring.description: Monitor assigned work, including StudiQ suggestions, to keep a steady learning rhythm.

lessonPanelTime.label: Time in lesson panels
lessonPanelTime.description: Time spent in lesson panels during the latest session (counted only while the tab is active).
lessonPanelTime.empty: No panel-time data yet. Data will appear after the learner goes through lessons.

history.label: Interaction history

history.loadMoreError: We could not load older interactions.
history.loadError: We could not load the interaction history.

history.filteredEmptyDescription: Change the filters to see more activity.

scores.title: Learner scores

trackSummary.label: Learner progress tracks

KangurUserAccess.checkCurrentAccount: that you are signed in with the correct account,
KangurUserAccess.checkAccessGranted: that an administrator has granted access to this account,
KangurUserAccess.checkSignInAgain: whether signing in again resolves the problem.

KangurLogin.defaultSessionDescription: Parents sign in with email and password. Students sign in with their nickname and password.

KangurLogin.enterStudentLoginAndPassword: Enter the student nickname and password.

AuthApi.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

KangurAuthApi.notificationsDisabled: Verification email sending is currently disabled. Contact the administrator.
KangurAuthApi.captchaMissing: Confirm that you are not a bot.
KangurAuthApi.parentAccountReady: The parent account is ready. Sign in with email and password.
KangurAuthApi.parentVerificationResent: We sent a new verification email. The parent account will activate after the address is verified.
KangurAuthApi.parentEmailConflict: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with email and password.

KangurAuthApi.parentAccountUnavailable: This parent account is no longer available.
KangurAuthApi.passwordAlreadySet: A password is already set for this account. You can sign in with email and password.

KangurAuthApi.onlyParentCanSetPassword: Only parent accounts can set a parent password.
KangurAuthApi.passwordTooWeak: The password does not meet the security requirements.
KangurAuthApi.passwordMinLength: The password must be at least {count} characters long.
KangurAuthApi.passwordUppercase: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
KangurAuthApi.passwordLowercase: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
KangurAuthApi.passwordNumber: The password must contain at least one number.
KangurAuthApi.passwordSymbol: The password must contain at least one special character.

validation.passwordMin: The learner password must have at least {count} characters.

validation.loginNamePattern: The nickname may contain only letters and numbers.

timeout.create: Profile creation is taking too long. Check the connection and try again.
timeout.activate: Profile activation is taking too long. Try selecting it manually.
timeout.refresh: Dashboard refresh is taking too long.
timeout.save: Saving the profile is taking too long. Try again.
timeout.delete: Deleting the profile is taking too long. Try again.

feedback.createdButInactive: The profile was added, but it could not be activated right away. Select it from the list.
feedback.deleteError: Could not remove the learner profile.

levelProgress.title: Level progress
levelProgress.summary: Check the current level, total XP, and the remaining distance to the next threshold.

lessonMastery.title: Lesson mastery
lessonMastery.summary: Check topics to revisit and the strongest areas based on saved lessons.
lessonMastery.emptyDescription: There are no saved lesson attempts yet. Finish any lesson to see strengths and review areas.
lessonMastery.reviewEmpty: All tracked lessons are at a safe level.
lessonMastery.strongestEmpty: Finish a few lessons first to see the strongest areas.

overview.title: Performance overview
overview.summary: The key metrics of the day: accuracy, mission, goal, and badges in one view.
overview.avatarDescription: Choose the hero that will be visible in the learner profile.
overview.xpTodayDescription: 7 days: +{weeklyXp} XP · average {averageXp} XP per session
overview.guidedRoundsUnlocked: All badges for the recommended path are unlocked.
overview.dailyQuestMissing: A new mission will appear with progress.
overview.dailyQuestLoading: Loading the mission of the day...

performance.title: Learner performance
performance.summary: See the rhythm of the last seven days and the accuracy for each operation.
performance.emptyDescription: Play a few tasks to see accuracy for each operation.
performance.operationStats: Attempts: {attempts} · XP per session: {averageXp} · Total: {totalXp} XP · Best accuracy: {bestScore}%

recommendations.title: Plan for today
recommendations.summary: A short list of the next steps based on recent results and activity.

sessions.title: Session history
sessions.summary: Check recent attempts and the badge tracks built by regular play.
sessions.errorDescription: Try refreshing the profile in a moment.
sessions.emptyDescription: The first sessions will appear here automatically.

errors.loadScores: Could not load the score history.

focusWeakestOperation.title: Focus on: {operation}
focusWeakestOperation.description: Do 2 short {operation} sessions and aim for at least 80% accuracy.

improveAccuracy.title: Stabilize accuracy
improveAccuracy.description: For the next 3 games, pick medium difficulty and focus on accuracy over speed.

strengthenLessonMastery.title: Review lesson: {lessonTitle}
strengthenLessonMastery.description: Current mastery is {masteryPercent}%. One more pass through this lesson will improve stability.

dailyGoal.title: Finish the daily goal
dailyGoal.descriptionSingle: Only 1 game is left to reach the daily goal. Today you already earned +{todayXpEarned} XP.
dailyGoal.descriptionMultiple: {remainingGames} games are left to reach the daily goal. Today you already earned +{todayXpEarned} XP.

boostXpMomentum.title: Boost today's XP
boostXpMomentum.descriptionWithOperation: The game goal is already done, but today only +{todayXpEarned} XP came in. One stronger {operation} session usually brings about {averageXpPerSession} XP per try.
boostXpMomentum.descriptionFallback: The game goal is already done, but today only +{todayXpEarned} XP came in. One stronger training session should bring in over {xpMomentumTarget} XP.

streakBootstrap.title: Build a streak
streakBootstrap.description: Play again tomorrow to start a streak of consecutive days.

maintainMomentum.title: Keep the momentum
maintainMomentum.descriptionWithOperation: You're in great shape. In 7 days you earned +{weeklyXpEarned} XP. Add 1 more {operation} session to lock it in.
maintainMomentum.descriptionFallback: You're in great shape. In 7 days you earned +{weeklyXpEarned} XP. Keep today's learning rhythm going.

libraryCard.completedAssignmentSummary: The parent assignment has already been completed. {summary}

documentRenderer.imageMissingSource: Image block has no source yet.

documentRenderer.noBlocksTitle: This page has no blocks yet.

questionCard.clockTitle: What time does the clock show?
questionCard.clockDescription: Choose the answer that matches the position of the hands.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You are an addition master!
summary.retry: Don't give up!

summary.perfect: Perfect! Subtraction master!
summary.retry: Keep practising!

summary.perfect: Perfect! Times-table master!
summary.retry: Keep practising!

summary.perfect: Perfect! Division master!
summary.retry: Keep practising!

summary.perfect: Perfect! You have mastered division.
summary.retry: Keep practising!

feedback.checkRemainder: Check how many items stay in the remainder.
feedback.equalGroups: Make sure every group has the same size.
feedback.correct: Nice work! The groups are even.
feedback.idle: Drag or click the items to split them into groups.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You really know the calendar!
summary.retry: Keep practising and you will master the calendar!

mixed.perfect: Perfect! You know the calendar inside out!
mixed.retry: Great! Keep practising the calendar challenges.

dni.perfect: Great! You recognise weekdays and weekends with confidence.
dni.retry: Practise weekday names and the weekend columns a bit more.

miesiace.perfect: Great! Months and seasons are nicely organised already.
miesiace.retry: Practise the order of the months and their seasons a bit more.

data.perfect: Great! You read calendar dates quickly and accurately.
data.retry: Practise finding specific dates on the calendar grid a bit more.

summary.sectionEncouragement: Don't give up. A few more attempts and this section will feel easier.

dni.guidance: You are practising weekday names and spotting weekends on the calendar layout.

miesiace.guidance: You are practising months, their order, and matching them to the correct season.

data.guidance: You are practising reading dates and finding a specific day on the calendar grid.
data.promptLabel: Find the correct date on the calendar

inRound.tryAgain: Oops, not that one. Try again!
inRound.confirmMonth: Click when you think you are on the correct month.
inRound.chooseSeason: Drag or choose the correct season below.

tasks.clickDate: Click the date in the calendar that falls on {weekdayName}
tasks.dragSeason: Drag the month "{monthName}" to the correct season

summary.perfect: Perfect! You spot patterns in a flash.
summary.good: Great! Patterns and sequences are getting easier.
summary.retry: Good try! Review the rule and try again.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise relationships in every context.
summary.good: Great! You have an eye for relationships.
summary.retry: Good try! Compare the differences and try again.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You classify really well.
summary.good: Great! You spot groups and odd ones out quickly.
summary.retry: Good try! A few more rounds and it will click.

feedback.wrong: That is not the odd one out.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Pronouns on point.
summary.retry: One more round and it will feel easy.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Warm-up complete.
summary.retry: One more warm-up round and it will click.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Prepositions mastered.
summary.retry: One more round and check the clue in each sentence.

order.dragInstruction: Drag the words to arrange the sentence

time-start.prompt: Build a sentence about a time.
time-start.title: Time: start

time-quiz.prompt: Build a sentence about a day of the week.
time-quiz.title: Time: day

time-month.prompt: Build a sentence about a month.
time-month.title: Time: month

place-notes.prompt: Build a sentence about a surface.
place-notes.title: Place: surface

place-bus.prompt: Build a sentence about a point or location.
place-bus.title: Place: point

relation-between.prompt: Build a sentence about a relation between points.
relation-between.title: Relations: between

feedback.perfect: Perfect! Everything is in the right place.

time-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct time preposition.
time-sort.hint: Hours = at, days = on, months = in.
time-sort.title: Time sorting

place-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct place preposition.
place-sort.hint: Point = at, surface = on, inside = in.
place-sort.title: Place sorting

relations-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct spatial relation.
relations-sort.hint: between = between, above = above, below = below.
relations-sort.title: Relations sorting

summary.good: Good job, only a few details left.
summary.retry: Do one more round and improve the sentence order.

inRound.fillHelp: Type the missing word, then click "Check".

feedback.correct: Great! That is how this sentence is built.

svo-order.prompt: Choose the sentence in correct S + V + O order.
svo-order.hint: Subject first, then verb, then object.
svo-order.question: Which sentence is correct?

order-words.prompt: Drag the words to build a correct sentence.
order-words.hint: Start with the subject, then the verb, then the rest.
order-words.question: Arrange: My friend always finishes homework on time.

do-question.prompt: Complete the question with the correct word.
do-question.question: ___ you play football on Saturdays?

connector-so.prompt: Quick round — you only have a few seconds!
connector-so.question: I was late, ___ I texted my coach.

frequency-adverb.prompt: Choose the correct position for the adverb.
frequency-adverb.hint: Frequency adverbs come before the main verb.
frequency-adverb.question: She ___ checks her notes after class.

summary.perfect: Perfect agreement.
summary.retry: One more round and it will click.

streamer-goes.prompt: Click the verb that matches singular.

everyone-arrives.prompt: Everyone still takes a singular verb.

there-are.prompt: There is/are depends on the noun after it.

either-players.prompt: With either/or, the verb matches the nearer subject.

pair-is.prompt: The phrase "pair of" counts as singular.

feedback.roundPerfect: Perfect! Every word is in the right place.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise parts of speech flawlessly.
summary.good: Great! You are very close to a perfect round.
summary.retry: Good job! Try once more and improve the score.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Your shapes look excellent.
summary.good: Great job! Your drawing keeps getting more precise.
summary.retry: Keep practising. Every next shape will be better.

success.circle: Great! That looks like a circle.
success.oval: Great! That looks like an oval.
success.triangle: Nice! That is a proper triangle.
success.square: Great! That looks like a square.
success.diamond: Nice! That looks like a diamond.
success.rectangle: Good! That looks like a rectangle.
success.hexagon: Great! That looks like a hexagon.

default.circle: Try drawing a more rounded line.
default.oval: Try drawing a more elongated oval.
default.square: Try drawing 4 sides of similar length.
default.diamond: Try drawing diagonal sides and 4 clear corners.
default.rectangle: Try drawing 4 corners and one side clearly longer than the other.

failure.closeShape: Close the shape. The start and end of the line are too far apart.
failure.tooShortPath: The line is too short. Trace the shape further around.
failure.tooJaggedPath: The line is too jagged. Try drawing more smoothly.
failure.addMoreCorners: Add more corners. This shape should have about {idealCorners}.
failure.tooManyCorners: There are too many corners. Try drawing about {idealCorners}.

aspect.square: A square should have sides of more similar lengths.
aspect.rectangle: A rectangle should have two sides clearly longer.
aspect.circle: A circle should look more even and round.
aspect.oval: An oval should be more stretched.
aspect.diamond: A diamond should be less flattened or less stretched.

failure.drawLonger: Draw a bigger shape in one continuous line.
failure.tooSmall: The shape is too small. Draw it larger.
failure.unreadable: The drawing could not be read.

inRound.liveRegion: Round {current} of {total}. Draw the {shape} shape. Level {difficulty}.
inRound.canvasAria: Drawing board for the {shape} shape. Use the mouse, touch, or keyboard to draw it.
inRound.inputHelp: The drawing area supports mouse, touch, or keyboard. Enter or space starts and ends a stroke, arrow keys move the cursor, and Escape clears the board.
inRound.tooShort: Draw the shape a little longer so it can be checked.

keyboard.restarted: A new shape round has started.
keyboard.cleared: The board was cleared and the cursor returned to the centre.

oval.label: Oval
oval.hint: Draw a shape without corners, but a bit stretched.

diamond.label: Diamond
diamond.hint: 4 corners, and the sides should look diagonal.

square.label: Square
square.hint: 4 sides, each side about the same length.

rectangle.label: Rectangle
rectangle.hint: 4 corners, with two sides clearly longer.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise geometry basics really well.
summary.good: Very good! Just a little more and it will be perfect.
summary.retry: Good try! Try again to reinforce the concepts.

inRound.missionTitle: Geo mission: point, segment, side, angle
inRound.instruction: Drag a label onto the marked spot or click a label and then the board.

feedback.correct: Great! That is the correct answer.

round-point.title: Point
round-point.prompt: Recognise a single place on the board.
round-point.hint: A point is one dot with no length or width.

round-segment.title: Segment
round-segment.prompt: Find the piece connecting two points.
round-segment.hint: A segment has a start and an end — two points.

round-side.title: Side
round-side.prompt: Find a side of the figure.
round-side.hint: A side is a segment belonging to a polygon.

round-angle.title: Angle
round-angle.prompt: Find the place where two segments meet.
round-angle.hint: An angle is the opening between two arms.

geometryPerimeter.progressAriaLabel: Accuracy in the perimeter drawing game

summary.perfect: Perfect! Perimeters mastered.
summary.good: Great job! Just a bit more and it will be perfect.
summary.retry: Good try! Try again.

keyboard.cleared: The board was cleared and the cursor returned to the centre.
keyboard.restarted: A new perimeter round has started.

errors.tooShort: Draw the shape a little longer so it can be checked.
errors.tooSmall: Draw a larger shape on the grid.
errors.alignToGrid: Draw carefully along the grid lines.
errors.squareSize: Try drawing a square with side length {size} squares.
errors.adjustEdges: Match the sides more closely to the grid lines.

feedback.shapeAccepted: Great! The shape matches the task.
feedback.selectPerimeter: The drawing is correct. Now choose the perimeter value.
feedback.incorrectPerimeter: Check the perimeter again. The correct answer is {perimeter} cm.

inRound.canvasAria: Drawing board for the {shape} shape. Use the mouse, touch, or keyboard to draw it.
inRound.inputHelp: The drawing area supports mouse, touch, or keyboard. Enter or space starts and ends a stroke, arrow keys move the cursor, and Escape clears the board.

square-3.title: Draw: square
square-3.hint: Draw a square with side length 3 squares.

square-4.title: Draw: square
square-4.hint: Draw a square with side length 4 squares.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Your reflections are spot on.
summary.good: Great job! Symmetry is getting easier for you.
summary.retry: Keep trying - each next attempt will be more precise.

axis.drawLonger: Draw a longer symmetry line from one end of the shape to the other.
axis.extendLine: The axis should be longer - draw it almost through the whole shape.
axis.keepStraightVertical: The axis of symmetry should be straight and vertical.
axis.keepStraightHorizontal: The axis of symmetry should be straight and horizontal.
axis.moveToCenter: Move the axis closer to the centre of the shape.
axis.success: Great! That is a correct axis of symmetry.

mirror.drawMissingHalf: Draw the missing half so the symmetry can be checked.
mirror.drawMore: Draw more of the shape - a large part of the reflection is still missing.
mirror.expectedSide: Draw on the green side of the symmetry axis.
mirror.alignToGhost: Try drawing the shape closer to the dashed reflection.
mirror.success: Nice! The reflection matches the axis.

keyboard.cleared: The board was cleared and the cursor returned to the centre.
keyboard.restarted: A new symmetry round has started.

inRound.tooShort: Make a few strokes so there is a line to check.

mirror.zoneHint: Draw only in the green zone. The grey zone is not for drawing.
mirror.ghostHint: The dashed line shows the missing reflection.

inRound.canvasAria: Drawing board for symmetry axes and reflections.
inRound.inputHelp: The drawing area supports mouse, touch, or keyboard. Enter or space starts and ends a stroke, arrow keys move the cursor, and Escape clears the board.

axis-butterfly.title: Butterfly axis
axis-butterfly.prompt: Draw the axis of symmetry of the butterfly.
axis-butterfly.hint: It is a vertical line through the centre - follow the green strip.

mirror-heart.title: Heart in the mirror
mirror-heart.prompt: Draw the missing half of the heart.
mirror-heart.hint: Reflect the shape across the axis by drawing on the green side.

axis-square.title: Square axis
axis-square.prompt: Draw the axis of symmetry of the square.
axis-square.hint: It is a vertical line in the middle of the square - the green strip shows the axis.

mirror-leaf.title: Leaf
mirror-leaf.prompt: Draw the lower half of the leaf.
mirror-leaf.hint: Reflect across the horizontal axis - draw in the green zone.

mirror-zigzag.title: Zigzag in the mirror
mirror-zigzag.prompt: Draw the reflection of the zigzag.
mirror-zigzag.hint: Draw only in the green zone on the right side of the axis.

axis-eye.title: Eye axis
axis-eye.prompt: Draw the axis of symmetry of the eye.
axis-eye.hint: It is a horizontal line through the middle - the green strip shows the axis.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Subtraction is at your fingertips.
summary.retry: Keep practising!

summary.title: You collected {score}/{total} groups!
summary.perfect: Grouping master! The times table is yours!
summary.retry: Good try! Keep playing to practise!

inRound.header: Tap each group to collect it!
inRound.progress: Collected: {collected}/{total} groups — tap the next one!

errors.start: Could not start the match. Try again.
errors.save: Could not save the move. Try again.

inRound.instruction: Drag the numbers to both sides so they match the targets.

summary.perfect: Perfect score! You are a Kangur champion! 🦘

summary.perfect: Perfect score! You are a math star! 🌟
summary.retry: Keep trying. You can do it! 🚀

clockTraining.adaptiveRetryAdded: We added a short review of this task.

minutes.promptLabel: Set the minutes on the clock face

combined.guidance: Set the hour first with the short hand, then fine-tune the minutes with the long hand.
combined.legend: You practise both moves at once: hours and minutes.

mixed.guidance: Sometimes you practise full hours, sometimes minutes, and sometimes the whole time. Use both hands.
mixed.legend: Switch between the short and long hand depending on the task.
mixed.promptLabel: Set the clock to the time

hours.default: Full hour. Set the short hand and keep the minutes at 00.

minutes.quarterPast: Quarter past. The short hand stays on 12.
minutes.halfHour: Half an hour. The short hand stays on 12.
minutes.fortyFiveMinutes: 45 minutes. The short hand stays on 12.
minutes.default: Focus on the long hand. The short hand stays on 12.

default.general: The hour hand moves together with the minutes.

hours.neighbor: Almost! That is the neighbouring hour.

hours.minutesStayZero: In the hours practice, the long hand stays on 12, so the minutes should be :00.
hours.checkShortHand: Check the short hand and choose the full hour.

minutes.moveOneTick: The long hand is almost correct. Move it by one more tick.
minutes.countByFives: Count the ticks by fives and adjust the long hand.
minutes.focusLongHand: Focus only on the long hand. The short hand stays on 12.

combined.adjustShortHand: The long hand is almost correct. Fine-tune the short hand (hours).

You set the correct full hour: {time}.
details.combined: You set the full time correctly: {time}.

details.minutes: You didn't set the minutes in time. Correct reading: {time}.
details.combined: You didn't set the full time in time. Correct time: {time}.
details.default: You didn't set the time in time. Correct time: {time}.

correct.nextStage: Correct answer. The next stage is next.
correct.nextTask: Correct answer. The next task is next.

wrong.summary: We checked the answer. Summary is next.
wrong.nextStage: We checked the answer. The next stage is next.
wrong.nextTask: We checked the answer. The next task is next.

idle.mixed: The hour hand moves smoothly with the minutes.

hours.perfect: Great! You read full hours confidently.
hours.retry: Practise full hours a bit more and watch the short hand.

minutes.perfect: Great! Minutes are under control now.
minutes.retry: Practise minutes a bit more by counting the marks by fives.

combined.perfect: Great! You combine hours and minutes with confidence.
combined.retry: Practise setting hours and minutes together a little more.

default.perfect: Perfect! You know the clock very well!
default.retry: Keep practising and you will master the clock!

basics.title: Addition basics
basics.description: What is addition? Single-digit addition + animation

synthesis.title: Addition synthesis
synthesis.description: Rhythmic answer lanes and quick sums

meaning.title: What does it mean to add?
meaning.lead: Addition means joining two groups together to count how many there are in all.
meaning.caption: Part + part makes a whole.

singleDigit.title: Single-digit addition
singleDigit.lead: You can count on your fingers or in your head. Start with the bigger number!
singleDigit.step3: The last number is the answer: 7 ✓
singleDigit.caption: Start at 4 and take three steps: 5, 6, 7.

motion.title: Addition in motion
motion.lead: The animation shows how two groups move and join into one sum.
motion.caption: The dots join into one group and create the sum.

overTen.title: Adding across 10
overTen.lead: When the sum goes past 10, you can make 10 first and then add the rest.
overTen.caption: 7 + 3 = 10, 2 left, so 10 + 2 = 12 ✓

numberLine.title: Jumps on the number line
numberLine.lead: Jump to 10 first, then add the rest.
numberLine.caption: 8 + 2 = 10, 3 left, so 10 + 3 = 13.

tenFrame.title: Ten frame
tenFrame.lead: Fill the missing spaces to 10, then add the rest next to it.
tenFrame.caption: First +3 to make 10, then +2 more.
steps: Add the rest next to it
Join both parts into the answer

motion.title: Two-digit addition in motion
motion.lead: First add the tens, then the ones. The animation shows how both groups join into the answer.
motion.caption: Tens: 20 + 10, ones: 4 + 3.

blocks.title: Tens and ones blocks
blocks.lead: Colour blocks show that tens and ones join separately.
blocks.caption: First 20 + 10, then 4 + 3. The sum is built from both parts.

columns.title: Tens and ones columns
columns.lead: Place the numbers in columns: tens under tens, ones under ones. Then add them separately.
columns.caption: First the tens, then the ones. The answer is built from both columns.

abacus.title: Abacus
abacus.lead: The abacus helps move the beads: tens and ones separately, then read the sum.
abacus.caption: The beads move toward one shared sum.

commutative.title: Swap the addends
commutative.label: Swap the addends
commutative.description: Swap the order and compare the answer.
commutative.caption: Change the order and the answer stays the same.

associative.title: Brackets and grouping
associative.description: See that different grouping gives the same answer.
associative.caption: Group numbers so they are easier to add.

zero.title: Zero = no change
zero.description: Add zero and see what happens.
zero.caption: Adding 0 does not change the answer.

doubles.title: Doubles
doubles.label: Doubles
doubles.description: Repeat the same number and count faster.
doubles.caption: Repeat the same number for a quick answer.

subtractingSvg.ariaLabel: Subtraction animation: 5 dots minus 2 dots leaves 3 dots.

numberLine.ariaLabel: Number line animation: 13 minus 5 as jumps to 10 and beyond.

abacus.ariaLabel: Abacus animation: subtracting tens and ones separately.

meaning.title: What does it mean to subtract?
meaning.lead: Subtraction means taking a part away from a group. We ask: how many are left?

singleDigit.title: Single-digit subtraction
singleDigit.lead: Move back on the number line or count how much is missing to reach the answer.
singleDigit.step3: The last number is the answer: 5 ✓

motion.title: Subtraction in motion (SVG)
motion.lead: The animation shows how we take some dots away and the answer stays behind.
motion.caption: Two dots move away, three stay.

overTen.title: Subtracting across 10
overTen.lead: Split the subtrahend into two parts: first move down to 10, then subtract the rest.

numberLine.title: Backward jumps on the number line
numberLine.lead: First go to 10, then keep moving back.
numberLine.caption: 13 − 3 = 10, then 10 − 2 = 8.

tenFrame.title: Ten frame
tenFrame.lead: Take away the part above 10 first, then the rest from the frame.
tenFrame.caption: First remove 3, then 2 more.

abacus.title: Abacus
abacus.lead: The abacus shows subtracting tens and ones separately.
abacus.caption: Take the beads away, then read the answer.

rules.title: Subtraction rules
rules.checkLead: If answer + subtrahend equals the starting number, it is correct.
rules.motionLead: You take a part away and watch what is left.
rules.motionCaption: Two dots move away, three stay.

backJumps.title: Backward jumps
backJumps.label: Jumps on the line
backJumps.lead: Move back in two steps: to 10, then farther.

tenFrame.title: Ten frame
tenFrame.label: Ten frame
tenFrame.lead: First remove the part above 10, then the rest from the frame.

checkAddition.title: Check the answer with addition
checkAddition.label: Checking
checkAddition.lead: Add the subtrahend to the answer and see if you return to the starting number.
checkAddition.caption: If addition matches, the subtraction is correct.

difference.title: Difference between numbers
difference.label: Difference
difference.lead: Compare two numbers and see how much is missing to the larger one.
difference.caption: The difference is the missing part.

game.title: Game: Draw the perimeter
game.description: Trace on the grid and choose the perimeter

intro.title: What is perimeter?
intro.lead: Perimeter is the total length of the outline of a shape. We add all the sides.
intro.callout: We go all the way around the shape and add the sides.
intro.caption: We measure perimeter in centimeters (cm), meters (m), and so on.

kwadrat.title: Perimeter of a square
kwadrat.formulaCaption: where a is the side length

prostokan.title: Perimeter of a rectangle
prostokan.formulaCaption: where a and b are the side lengths
prostokan.oppositeCaption: Opposite sides are equal - add the pairs.

podsumowanie.item1: Perimeter is the sum of all sides.
podsumowanie.item4: A perimeter unit can be cm or m, for example.
podsumowanie.item5: Always check whether you added each side only once.
podsumowanie.traceCaption: Perimeter is one full lap around the shape.
podsumowanie.sidesCaption: Add the side pairs: a + a, b + b.

hours.title: Section 1: Hours (short hand)
hours.subtitle: We learn only the short hand and full hours (:00).

minutes.title: Section 2: Minutes (long hand)
minutes.subtitle: We learn only the long hand and the minute map.

combined.title: Section 3: Hours and Minutes Together
combined.subtitle: We combine both hands and read the full time.

minutes.title: Minutes
minutes.description: Long hand and counting by fives

combined.title: Combining the hands
combined.description: Read the full time on the clock

gameHours.title: Practice: Hours
gameHours.description: Train full hours and the short hand

gameMinutes.title: Practice: Minutes
gameMinutes.description: Train the long hand and minutes by fives

gameCombined.title: Practice: Full time
gameCombined.description: Combine hours and minutes into a full time reading

hubSections.combinedLockedDescription: Unlock after completing Hours and Minutes.

whatShortHand.title: What does the short hand show?
whatShortHand.tts: The short hand shows the hour. In this section we look only at it.
whatShortHand.animationCaption: The short hand jumps from hour to hour.
whatShortHand.caption: We look at the short hand. It tells us what hour it is.

fullHours.title: Full hours (:00)
fullHours.tts: When it is a full hour, we read only the hour from the short hand.
fullHours.animationCaption: It is a full hour when the long hand points to 12.
fullHours.caption: In this section we practise only reading the hour: 1, 6, 11.

quickTest.title: Quick hours test
quickTest.tts: Look only at the short hand and say the hour. We ignore minutes.
quickTest.animationCaption: Focus on the short hand and name the hour.
quickTest.stepText:
1. Find the short hand.
2. Read the number it points to.

whatLongHand.title: What does the long hand show?
whatLongHand.tts: The long hand shows minutes. In this section we focus only on minutes.
whatLongHand.animationCaption: The long hand makes one full turn in 60 minutes.
whatLongHand.caption: The long hand moves around the dial and tells us how many minutes have passed.

fiveMinuteMap.title: Minute map by fives
fiveMinuteMap.tts: Each number means the next five minutes: 1 means 5, 2 means 10, 3 means 15, and so on.
fiveMinuteMap.caption: Remember: every next number means +5 minutes.

quickTest.title: Quick minutes test
quickTest.tts: Look only at the long hand and name the minutes.
quickTest.stepText:
The long hand stands at 7.
7 × 5 = 35 minutes.

combineHands.title: How do we combine both hands?
combineHands.tts: First we read the hour from the short hand, then the minutes from the long hand.
combineHands.animationCaption: The short hand shows the hour, the long hand shows the minutes.

quarterPastQuarterTo.title: Quarter past and quarter to
quarterPastQuarterTo.tts: When the long hand is on 3, it is quarter past, and on 9 it is quarter to the next hour.
quarterPastQuarterTo.caption: We read the hour and minutes at the same time.

readyForPractice.title: Ready for practice
readyForPractice.tts: Now you can read hours and minutes together. Move on to practice.
readyForPractice.animationCaption: Half an hour is :30, with the long hand on 6.
readyForPractice.caption:
Great job! You can:
🔴 read hours,
🟢 read minutes,
✅ combine both hands into the full time.

hourHandSweep.ariaLabel: Animation: the short hand jumps from hour to hour.

minuteHandSweep.ariaLabel: Animation: the long hand makes a full turn.

fiveMinuteSteps.ariaLabel: Animation: 5-minute steps on the clock face.

quarter.ariaLabel: Animation: quarter past and quarter to.

halfPast.ariaLabel: Animation: half past, with the minute hand on 6.

minuteByMinute.ariaLabel: Animation: the minute hand moves minute by minute.

fullHourStep.ariaLabel: Animation: the short hand stops on full hours.

secondHand.ariaLabel: Animation: the second hand spins quickly.

hours.title: Practice: Hours
hours.tts: Now you move to full-hour practice. Set the short hand just like in the first hours practice panel.

minutes.title: Practice: Minutes
minutes.tts: Now you move to minute practice. Set the long hand just like in the first minutes practice panel.

combined.title: Practice: Full time
combined.tts: Now you move to full-time practice. Set both hands just like in the first full-time practice panel.

training.leaveChallengeMessage: If you leave Challenge Mode now, this challenge will not count as completed.
